name: xdm_typography_shell_cleanup_overlay
description: Introduces a semantic typography and control system, accessible persistent form labels, bounded numeric inputs, vector navigation icons, improved dark-theme contrast, distinct destructive actions, and a page-owned scrolling shell with contextual dashboard summaries.
commitMessage: Improve typography and clean up the application shell
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms, CoreFx or MSIX targets
Preserve all eight navigation sections and existing workflow behavior
Preserve the optional aria2 integration from commit e2ca125
Do not add aria2 or UI enhancements to the legacy parity ledger
Keep settings persistence compatible with the existing string-backed editor model
Require zero warnings and zero errors
